name: Assignment
text: Neither Party may assign or transfer its rights or obligations under this Agreement without the prior written consent of the other Party, except where such assignment is required by law.
invalid_if: Assignment allowed in contracts where personal obligations exist
source: Transfer of Property Act, 1882; Indian Contract Act, 1872
title: Assignment
dispute_hotspots: Assignment of receivables — SARFAESI / factoring — anti-assignment clause may conflict
Group company assignments — 'affiliate' definition must be precise
Assignment after insolvency — IBC provisions override contractual restriction
